assertions: The output includes a BTCUSDT price that appears to have been fetched live (not assumed or hardcoded)
The output identifies daily trend as uptrend, downtrend, or sideway
The output lists at least 3 S/R zones (resistance or support)
The output includes Fibonacci levels showing at least 4 ratios (0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618)
The output includes either an active short setup with entry + SL + TP, or a list of pending limit short setups
The output includes an invalidation level for the short thesis
